summary: Iteration 6: Tested 3 new bulk item endpoints and 5 UI enhancements (column headers per group, row checkboxes, insert-between-rows, floating bulk actions bar, Export to Excel in board context menu). Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 UX features verified end-to-end including a real Excel file download via the context menu.

minor.issue: ItemCreate schema omits 'position' field; all newly created items persist at position=0 regardless of client-supplied position. Impacts correct ordering after insert-at, and makes initial Excel import order undefined.
ItemUpdate also omits 'position'; cannot reorder existing items via normal update endpoint.
No authorization check: any authenticated user can insert items into any board/group. Add membership/owner verification like other endpoints.
No authorization check on target board; any authenticated user can bulk-move or bulk-delete items from any board by id. Add board membership validation.

action_items: Add 'position: Optional[int] = None' (and similar on ItemUpdate) to /app/backend/models.py so clients and /items/insert-at can assign stable positions.
Add authorization checks (board membership/owner) to POST /items/insert-at, /items/bulk-move, /items/bulk-delete (mirroring existing patterns in other routes).
critical_code_review_comments: item_routes.py bulk endpoints accept a raw dict body rather than a Pydantic schema - move to typed BulkMoveRequest/BulkDeleteRequest/InsertAtRequest models for validation and OpenAPI docs.

The insert-at shift uses $inc on all items at position>=target - consider limiting impact by only touching the rows within the same board_id+group_id (already does), but recommend an index on (board_id, group_id, position) to keep this O(log n).

TableView.jsx (522 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold and mixes 5 unrelated concerns (grouping, selection, insert, bulk ops, column rendering). Consider extracting hooks: useBulkSelection, useInsertRow, useGroupCustomization.
handleBulkMove / handleBulkDelete / handleInsertAt duplicate try/catch+toast patterns - extract a small wrapper to DRY.

ItemCreate position missing means the new InsertRow UX will visually place new items below existing rows for boards where all items are at position=0 (ordering falls back to insertion order) - currently acceptable but fragile.
seed_data_creation: Test fixture creates a TEST_BulkOps_<hex> board with 2 groups and 3 items, and cleans up by deleting the board at teardown. A few ToDelete-* items were created inside that test board and removed by bulk-delete during testing. The shared 'Pipeline Test' board (8110ddb1-2cd2-4ce6-a27d-a4ef5120744a) was used read-only for frontend validation (only checkbox selection, no deletes triggered).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new endpoints and 5 UI features work end-to-end. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_features.py are fully passing (11/11). The pre-existing bug where POST /api/items ignores position (because ItemCreate/ItemUpdate don't declare it) is logged as minor; insert-at correctly shifts items but the absence of position in create/update means seed-data ordering is undefined. Context menu trigger uses <MoreHorizontal> which renders as 'svg.lucide-ellipsis' (only ONE on page); dropdown item has data-testid='board-export-excel'. Bulk bar uses data-testid='bulk-actions-bar','bulk-delete-btn','bulk-move-btn','move-to-group-{id}'. Row checkboxes: data-testid='item-checkbox-{id}'. Insert buttons: data-testid='insert-item-{groupId}-{position}'.

passed: Backend: POST /api/items/insert-at - insert at position, shifts existing items at position>=target, returns 400 on missing board_id or group_id, 401 unauthenticated
Backend: POST /api/items/bulk-move - moves multiple items to target group, returns moved count, persists change (verified by GET), 400 on missing inputs, 401 unauthenticated
Backend: POST /api/items/bulk-delete - deletes multiple items, returns deleted count, subsequent GET returns 404, 400 on empty list, 401 unauthenticated

Frontend: Login + navigate to Pipeline Test board succeeds; column headers (ITEM, PERSON, NBR, PROPERTY, E AGENTS, SOLICITORS, ACCOUNT NO, STATUS, etc.) render INSIDE each of the 4 groups (4x 'Item' headers found matching 4 groups)
Frontend: 203 row-level checkboxes rendered (data-testid='item-checkbox-{id}'); selecting checkboxes reveals floating bulk actions bar with '2 selected' label
Frontend: Bulk actions bar contains Delete and Move to buttons; Move to dropdown lists all 4 groups (Pipeline, Completed, NFA, Enquiry - Working On)
Frontend: Board context menu (...) opens via the lucide-ellipsis trigger, and contains 'Export to Excel' entry (data-testid='board-export-excel')
Frontend: Clicking 'Export to Excel' triggers an actual file download 'Pipeline Test.xlsx' via browser download event
Frontend: Hover insert-row zones render insert buttons (data-testid='insert-item-{groupId}-{position}') - 207 present in DOM for 203 rows + between-row slots
not_tested: Actual bulk delete via UI not executed to avoid destroying the seeded Pipeline Test board data; backend bulk-delete flow is covered by pytest (TestBulkDelete::test_01_bulk_delete_items).
Actual insert-at via UI click not triggered on the production board to avoid polluting data; covered by pytest TestInsertAt.
